what_it_does: This file stores a YAML-frontmatter metadata record for a channel attachment that links the dragnet-development channel to a board item identified by board://item-e0f43afe.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter inside a markdown file
It declares an attachment id att-9713548c
The target field uses a board:// URI pointing to item-e0f43afe
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is present
There is no prose body or code content
standouts: The file is a pure metadata stub with no body
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a markdown file
Uses an ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone
Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item
notes: A metadata stub that records a board-item attachment from the dragnet-development channel to item-e0f43afe.
questions: What content or state does board item item-e0f43afe represent?
What channel message or thread this attachment is anchored to is not shown
Whether there are lifecycle fields such as updated or removed timestamps
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file acts as a channel attachment ledger entry that records a typed, timestamped link to a board item.
intention_signals: To preserve a lightweight, timestamped association between a channel and a board item so the relationship can be retrieved and reconstructed later.
contribution: A typed, timestamped link between the dragnet-development channel and board item item-e0f43afe, preserving provenance and cross-reference context.
summary_for_embedding: This markdown file is a channel attachment metadata record (id att-9713548c) of type board_items that links the dragnet-development channel to board item item-e0f43afe with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to record and preserve the association of a board item with a channel for later retrieval and context reconstruction.
